speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta
text: Main thak kar baith nahi sakta. Subah termination email dekha aur dimaag sunn ho gaya, par rone ka time nahi hai kyunki agle mahine ki home loan EMI ka sawal hai. Papa kisan thay aur unhone mujhe is umeed mein padhaya tha ki main parivaar sambhaalunga. Mere liye breakdown ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta; mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah naya rasta dhoondna hai taaki ghar ki 'izzat' bachi rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror their duty frame first to show their primary concern is heard.
text: Tumhara saara focus abhi sirf is zimmedari par hai ki chahe jo ho jaaye, ghar ki izzat aur EMI ka cycle tutna nahi chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta
text: Haan, EMI bounce hui toh sab khatam. Papa ko gaon mein kya muh dikhaunga? Main breadwinner hoon, isliye mere paas thak kar baithne ka option hi nahi hai. Mujhe bas jaldi se naya kaam dhoondna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly name the implied fear regarding the family's respect.
text: Sabse bada darr yeh satane laga hai ki agar agla rasta nahi mila, toh gaon mein parivaar ke samman par aanch aa jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta
text: Bilkul wahi darr hai. Dimaag mein lagatar calculations chal rahi hain bank balance aur kharchon ki. Rone ya udas hone ka waqt kahan hai mere paas? Main thak kar baith nahi sakta jab itne logon ka bhaar akele mere kandhon par hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the internal cost of suppressing emotions to act like a machine.
text: Jab tum khud ko rone ya udas hone ki ijazat nahi dete aur ek machine ki tarah chalne ki koshish karte ho, toh andar hi andar yeh akelepan ka bojh kaisa lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar se khokhla lagta hai. Pata nahi ye dikhawa kab tak kar paunga ki main sab sambhal lunga. Par mujhe strong rehna hi hoga, options nahi hain mere paas. Neend aani band ho gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the physical and temporal toll of carrying this alone.
text: Pichle kuch dino se, ya shayad saalon se, tumne apne thakne aur rukne ke har raste ko poori tarah se block kar diya hai, jiski wajah se sukoon ki neend bhi chali gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Karna padta hai... Agar maine gaon mein bol diya ki meri naukri chali gayi, toh log kya kahenge? Hamare relatives pehle hi taane marte thay ki metro jakar kaun sa bada teer maar lega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a shorter restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Relatives ke taano ka darr tumhe apni sachai apno se hi chupane par majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta
text: Sahi samjhe aap. Isliye main kisi ko nahi bata raha. Chup chap raat-din job portals scroll kar raha hoon. Aankhein jal rahi hain screen dekh-dekh kar, par main thak kar baith nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the physical/emotional limit they are pushing themselves towards.
text: Is lagatar bhag-daud mein, jahan aankhein jal rahi hain aur dimaag sunn hai, tumhara sharir tumhe andar se kya batane ki koshish kar raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sharir toh jawab de chuka hai sach kahun toh. Lagta hai bas kisi bhi pal gir jaunga. Ek machine ki tarah chal toh raha hoon, par andar ka engine poori tarah seize ho chuka hai. Fans gaya hoon buri tarah.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying feeling of EXHAUSTION tied to their duty.
text: Lagta hai in saari financial zimmedariyon aur EMI ka akele bojh uthate-uthate tum ek aisi gahri EXHAUSTION mehsoos kar rahe ho jise poori duniya se chupana pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... wahi EXHAUSTION hai. Aisa lagta hai saansein tabhi chalengi jab bank account mein salary credit hogi. Uske bina meri koi value nahi hai ghar mein. Main sirf ek ATM ban gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate feeling overwhelmed as culturally normal for a breadwinner, separating worth from job outcome.
text: Metro shehar mein akele EMI aur ghar ka pressure jhelte hue aisi gahri thakan mehsus karna bilkul natural hai; par yaad rakhna, ek corporate email ya job status tumhari mehnat aur tumhari insani value ko tay nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sunkar thoda theek laga. Par sach toh yeh hai ki naukri bina main unki nazron mein fail ho jaunga. Pata nahi aur log is naye corporate culture aur akelepan ko kaise survive karte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about breadwinners hiding job losses.
text: Breadwinner roles mein achanak job chhutne aur akele usko sambhalne ka yeh pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi aas-pass bolega nahi kyunki sabpar apne ghar ki izzat bachane ka pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh pressure hi toh maar deta hai aadmi ko. Ab kya karoon? Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... main bas is sunn pan se bahar nikal kar ek kadam aage badhana chahta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable steps that respect their duty and can be done quickly.
text: Is sunn pan ko todne ke liye do chhote kadam le sakte hain abhi: ya toh apne account ka balance check karke sirf agle mahine ki EMI ka clear hisaab paper par likh lo, ya phir apne purane resume ko bas open karke uski ek reading maar lo bina kuch edit kiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Resume dekhne ki himmat toh sach mein nahi hai abhi. Par EMI ka hisaab karna theek rahega. Kam se kam pata toh chalega ki reality mein kitna time hai mere paas naya rasta dhoondne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk them step by step through their chosen task.
text: Pehle ek blank paper aur pen lo... phir apna current bank balance aur full and final settlement ka estimated amount likho... bas itna hi calculation karna hai aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ruko... okay, likh liya. Savings aur FNF mila kar... kareeb dhai ya teen mahine ki EMI aur rent aaram se nikal jayega. Maine socha tha kal hi subah sab kuch bik jayega mera.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe their earlier panic as a systemic symptom of financial stress, not a personal flaw.
text: Aksar job loss wale aarthik dabaav mein hamara dimaag automatically sabse bure nateeje ki tasveer banata hai, par actual numbers paper par likhne se wo darr haqeeqat se chhota ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Teen mahine hain mere paas. Main itna panic kar raha tha ki saans nahi li ja rahi thi. Ye numbers dekh kar thodi rahat mili hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how having a concrete timeframe has provided breathing room.
text: Jabse tumne in teen mahino ka clear time-frame paper par dekha hai, tabse us extreme ghabrahat ki jagah thodi saans lene ki jagah ban gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bohot zaroori thi ye saans. Par darr ye hai ki IT sector ka haal abhi down hai. Teen mahine mein nahi mila toh? Wahi panic wala loop wapas shuru ho raha hai dimaag mein thoda thoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt them to set a micro-goal for tomorrow to keep the focus narrow and manageable.
text: Is naye aate hue darr ko handle karne ke liye, aur in teen mahino ka poora aur sahi istemaal karne ke liye, kal ka sabse chhota aur achievable target kya hona chahiye?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta
text: Kal bas apna LinkedIn profile update karunga aur purane colleagues ko ek casual message dalunga open positions ke liye. Main thak kar baith nahi sakta, par shayad ab thodi der aaram se chal zaroor sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate their shift in pace as a responsible and practical choice.
text: Aaram se chalne ka yeh badlaav aur apne professional network se judne ka decision dikhata hai ki tum apni sabhi zimmedariyan thos aur samajhdari bhare tarike se poori kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, colleagues shayad judge na karein kyunki layoffs sab jagah ho rahe hain. Gaon mein nahi samajhte yeh sab, par metro ka crowd isko reality ki tarah dekhta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how they are selectively engaging with a safe network.
text: Ghar walo ko is nayi corporate tension se bacha kar, tum un logo se connect karne ka soch rahe ho jo is reality ko bina kisi taane ke practically samajh sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Papa ko tension nahi dena chahta waise hi unki tabiyat theek nahi rehti. Unhe tabhi bataunga jab haath mein naya offer letter hoga, tab tak ye mera akele ka safar hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe their secrecy as a protective, caring mechanism rather than a burden.
text: Apne rural parivaar ko corporate utaar-chadhaav ke achanak aane wale stress se bacha kar rakhna ek bahut aam aur deep caring mechanism hota hai aise waqt mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe lagta tha main unse sach chupa raha hoon, par aapne ise caring mechanism bol kar mere andar ka guilt thoda kam kar diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about their immediate plan to wind down.
text: Ab jab guilt aur panic dono thode kam hue hain, toh aaj raat ke liye khud ko sukoon dene ka tumhara kya plan hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj raat main sirf apna laptop band karunga, ek acchi si chai banaunga aur koshish karunga ki neend poori ho. Kal subah fresh dimaag se colleagues ko text karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how rest has now become part of their duty routine.
text: Ek breadwinner hone ke naate, kal ki ladai ke liye khud ko recharge karna tumne apni aaj ki sabse badi duty bana li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul sahi kaha. Recharge hona bhi ab meri duty ka hi hissa hai. Subah lag raha tha duniya khatam ho gayi, par ab kam se kam agla kadam clear hai. Shukriya mere sath is tarah baat karne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End with a warm validation of their resilience and clarity.
text: Tumhara is andhere se nikal kar practical kadam uthana sach mein kabile-tareef hai; apne us naye safar aur kal ki chai ke liye khud par bharosa rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Naukri chali gayi hai par main laptop band nahi kar sakta kyunki bacchon ki school fees aur vehicle loan ki kist sar par hai. Savings wipe out ho chuki hain aur debt spiral ka darr hai, par structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai kyunki main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon. Thakan itni hai ki sharir jawab de raha hai, par main thak sakta hoon par ruk nahi sakta kyunki mere peeche poora khandaan khada hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the Seeker's duty frame of being the last hope and ignoring physical limits for the family's financial needs.
text: Parivaar ki aakhri umeed hone ke naate, aapne apni thakan ko bilkul bhula diya hai taaki bacchon ki fees aur loan ki kist waqt par ja sake.

speaker: Seeker
text: Karna hi padega na, sir. Agar maine haath khade kar diye toh ye vehicle loan aur ghar ka kharcha kaun dekhega? Bas laga hua hoon ki koi freelance ya consulting gig mil jaye. Sab sambhal lenge, bas thoda time chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of the family's financial system collapsing if he pauses.
text: Sab kuch akele sambhalne ki is lagatar koshish mein, shayad yeh darr satata hai ki agar aap ruke toh poora kharcha hi bikhar jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Bikharne ka hi toh darr hai. Savings wiped out hone ke baad se ek ajeeb sa pressure chest mein rehta hai. Par kisi ko dikha nahi sakta. Structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai, isliye biwi-bacchon ke saamne normal rehna padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe how he handles the heavy physical sensation of pressure while masking it from his family.
text: Ghar walon ke saamne hamesha normal dikhne ka yeh pressure jab chest mein bahut zyada bhari mehsoos hota hai, tab us feeling ko kaise bardasht karte hain aap?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bardasht karna aadat ho gayi hai. Raat ko jab sab so jaate hain, tab akele laptop par EMI aur interest calculate karta hoon. Aisa lagta hai kisi debt spiral mein fass gaya hoon jahan se bahar aane ka rasta dhundla ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the duration and isolation of his late-night struggles with financial calculations.
text: Raat ke us sannate mein, jab sab so rahe hote hain, tab lagatar akele apne hisaab-kitaab aur us spiral ke darr ke saath waqt bitana padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar main unhe bataunga toh unki neend bhi udd jayegi. Aur bahar doston ko batane mein izzat ka sawal hai. Log kya sochenge ki itne saal kaam karke bhi failure ban gaya? Ek head of the family ko sab akele hi handle karna hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma and relational isolation softly by mirroring the need to protect respect.
text: Izzat ki khatir aap is akelepan aur bojh ko chup-chap apne andar daba rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Wahi toh meri zindagi ka rule raha hai humesha. Structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai. Par sach kahu toh ab lag raha hai ki battery dead ho rahi hai. Screen dekhte hue aakhein jalti hain, dimaag ekdum sunn pad jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the underlying exhaustion coming from the C5 debt pressure and his duty-based coping mechanism.
text: Lagta hai ki poore khandaan ko is aarthik sankat se bachaane ki lagatar koshish ne aur akele ladne ki zid ne aapko ab andar se poori tarah se exhaust kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exhaustion hi hai. 20 saal se lagatar mehnat kar raha hoon bina ruke. Socha tha aage thoda thehrao aayega, par ab savings wipe out ho gayi toh wapas base se start karna pad raha hai. Yehi darr khaye ja raha hai ki ab aage kaise hoga?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his exhaustion and fear as culturally expected for a middle-class breadwinner losing their foundation.
text: Bees saal ki mehnat ke baad achanak job chali jana aur saari savings khatam ho jana, is badi sthiti mein kisi ka bhi is tarah thaka hua aur dara hua mehsoos karna bilkul natural hai, aapki mehnat aur qadr us balance sheet se tay nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh bilkul theek keh rahe hain aap, par hamari society aise nahi dekhti. Yahan log sirf result dekhte hain. Main theek dikhne ki koshish zaroor karta hoon par ab ghutan hone lagi hai. Main sirf ek ATM banke reh gaya hoon jise rukhne ki ijazat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about how common it is for Indian breadwinners to hide job loss due to structural expectations.
text: Hamare middle-class parivaaron mein breadwinners ka apni job loss ki ghutan chupana bahut common hai—sirf aapka nahi, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki sab par ek strong pillar bane rehne ka bojh hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha... yahi sabse mazboot pillar banne ki zid ne hi halat kharab kar di hai. Main theek hona chahta hoon, kam se kam raat ko thodi der dimaag toh shant ho. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, aap batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer actionable, practical steps matching his persona that don't add to his obligations.
text: Jab dimaag par loans aur kist ka itna overload ho, tab hum do chhote kadam utha sakte hain. Pehla, bank se vehicle loan par temporary moratorium ke baare mein online pata karna, ya dusra, abhi laptop band karke agle 10 minute balcony mein bina phone ke tahalna. Aapko abhi ke liye inmein se kya theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bank ka naam sunte hi waise hi ghabrahat badh rahi hai abhi. Laptop band karke 10 minute bina screen ke balcony mein jana shayad is sunn pade dimaag ko thoda relief de.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk him through stepping away from the laptop.
text: Pehle abhi apne us laptop ko sleep mode mein dalkar screen band kijiye... phir aaram se balcony mein ja kar sirf aati-jaati hawa par dhyaan dijiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, lid band kar di hai maine. Ajeeb lag raha hai itne ghanton baad bina us screen light ke. Ab samajh aa raha hai ki gardan mein kitna zyada stiffness jama hua tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how stepping away from his duty-tool reveals the physical toll he was suppressing.
text: Kaam ke us screen se thoda door hat'te hi aapko us sharirik dard ka ehsaas ho gaya jise aap apni zimmedariyon ki wajah se lagatar nazarandaz karte aa rahe the.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Nazarandaz karna padta hai na sir. Structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai akhir. Par aaj mehsoos ho raha hai ki agar is body ko thoda break nahi diya, toh lamba safar tay karna mushkil ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the job loss as a systemic macroeconomic issue rather than a personal failure of duty.
text: Aaj kal ke is daur mein achanak job layoffs hona ek poore industry ka structural pattern ban chuka hai, yeh aapki akele ki chook nahi hai, isliye apne aap ko iska akela zimmedar na maanein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach baat hai, mere network mein kaafi purane logon ko bhi nikal diya gaya hai. Shayad main thoda zyada harsh ho raha tha apne khud ke upar. EMI aur bank ka tension kal subah fresh dimaag se dekhunga ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the relief of postponing the burden until tomorrow.
text: Apne hi upar banaye us harsh dabaav ko hata kar, bank ke tension ko kal subah tak taalna aapke mind ko abhi kaafi thehrao de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thehrao zaroori bhi hai. Bacchon ki next quarter fees ka intezaam kuch FD aur purane investments tod ke manage ho jayega. Main bewajah poori picture ko abhi debt spiral maan ke darr raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how finding a tangible solution for the fees affects his sense of control moving forward.
text: Jab aap is tarah se FD aur purane investments ka backup bacchon ki fees ke liye tay karte hain, toh aage aane wali uncertainity ka samna karne ke liye kaisa lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda control wapas haath mein aata mehsoos ho raha hai. Pata nahi kyun par ab lag raha hai ki waqai sab sambhal lenge. Ek do choti savings abhi bachi hain jo liquid ho sakti hain easily.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how shifting from the feared consequence of spiraling to having liquid options brings a new sense of security.
text: Jo kuch ghante pehle poora future bikharne ka ek bura darr tha, wo ab options dekh kar ek naye bharose aur control mein badal raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bharosa hone se raste milte hain. Kal subah apni wife ko bhi baith kar hint dunga ki job market kharab hai aur main theek se naye options dekh raha hoon. Usse ek back-up plan ka idea milega usko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the relational step of involving his wife and reducing the isolated burden.
text: Apni wife ko apne is sachche safar ka hissa banane ki soch, is akele bojh ko baant kar dono ke rishte ko aur mazboot karne ka naya kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Haan, sab kuch khud chupana shayad unki samajhdaari par doubt karne jaisa tha. Wo situation samjhengi aur shayad kharche manage karne mein meri aadhi duty utha lein. Structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai, par ab unka saath milna zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how taking this first step towards teamwork will change his daily burden.
text: Ek solid teamwork se apne ghar ki financial duty jab aadhi share ho jayegi, toh kal se aapke khud ke routine par iska kya asar padega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Asar yeh hoga ki meri ghutan aadhi ho jayegi. Main subah relax hoke naha kar unke sath baithunga. Aaram se ek budget banayenge agle teen mahine ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his structured and teamwork-oriented approach to reclaiming his role.
text: Ghar ke main pillar hone ke bawajood, ab aap is mushkil ko clear budget aur partner ke sath ek behtar plan banakar handle karne ke liye tayyar hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tayyar hona padta hai boss. Team work ki zaroorat thi mujhe shuru se, bas society ke standards ke chakkar mein akele phans gaya tha. Aaj pehli baar thoda lighter feel ho raha hai body mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the physical relief of breaking away from isolated relational expectations.
text: Dikhawe ke us samajik bojh ko thoda kam karke apno ka sach mein sahara lene se hi aapke dimaag aur body ko yeh lightness mili hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne ekdum theek kaha. Bacchon ka education safe rahega aur hum figure out kar lenge baki chizein. Main ab iss balcony se andar ja raha hoon aur aaj sone ki poori koshish karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his progress from fear to a calm plan for rest.
text: Kuch der pehle wali us lambi ghutan aur exhaustion se nikalkar abhi khud ko chain ki neend dene jana, aage ke behtar din ke liye sabse zaroori kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Termination letter milte hi laga jaise saans ruk gayi, par EMI bounce hui toh bank wale gaon mein phone karenge aur 'log kya kahenge' ye soch kar darr lagta hai. Health neglect karke saalon se Mumbai me kaam kar raha hoon aur ab bhi mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga taaki ghar ka chula chalta rahe. Mere paas in sab rone dhone ke liye waqt nahi hai, mujhe bas apne parivaar ki 'shaan' bachane ke liye bina ruke ladte rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the rigid duty expectation that forces him to ignore his own pain (Lens B).
text: Tumhare upar achanak aayi is aafat ke baad bhi, apna darr mehsoos karne ki bajaye tum khud ko ek sahara banaye rakhne par majboor kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur kya karu? Gaon me sab mere bheje hue paise ka wait karte hain. EMI aur rashan sab meri duty hai, chahe meri naukri jaye ya jaan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the underlying fear of the social consequences in his village if he fails (Lens E).
text: Andar hi andar yeh khauf sata raha hai ki bank walo ka ek phone gaon pahunchte hi saari bani banayi izzat bikhar jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Pitaji kisi ko muh dikhane layag nahi rahenge agar loan recovery wale aagaye. Main chahe andar se pura toot jau, mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga har keemat par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompted reflection on the internal toll of strictly hiding his reality.
text: Is akelepan aur darr ke sath jab tum lagatar apne ghar walo se sab kuch chupate ho, toh wo chuppi ka bojh kaisa lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh toh bahut hai, saans fulti hai soch kar. Par mard ro thodi sakta hai. Kisi dost ko bataya toh bolenge Mumbai ja kar fail ho gaya, na mard nikla.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirrored the stigma and gender expectation forcing him to hide his fear, ending with a pause (Lens B).
text: Apne dosto ke beech bhi apni majboori dikhana tumhe apni kamzori ka tana sunne jaisa darr lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur sach kahu toh main bahut thak gaya hoon. Din raat bas machine ki tarah paisa bhejne ke chakkar me saari health kharab kar li, aur ab dekho, job bhi chali gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Named the deep exhaustion hiding beneath his duty-based coping mechanism now that he named the core conflict.
text: Lagta hai ek adarsh beta banne ki lagatar koshish me, din raat mehnat karke parivaar ko bachate bachate, ek bahut gehri thakaan aa chuki hai jise tumne ab tak daba rakha tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul aisa hi hai. Na theek se sota hoon mahino se, na time pe khana khata hoon. Bas ye EMI bounce hone ka khauf dimaag me chalta rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated his helplessness as culturally normal for migrant breadwinners and separated his worth from the job loss.
text: Bahar is bade shehar me akele pad jana aur achanak aisi financially pareshani aane par helplessness feel karna bilkul aam baat hai, aur ye mail tumhari saalon ki mehnat pe koi sawal nahi uthata.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Mehnat toh bahut ki thi, par ab fail lag raha hoon khud ki nazron me. Par halat chahe jo ho, mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga, warna gaon me unka kharcha kaise chalega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the painful relational dynamic where he feels reduced to a mere financial provider (Lens C).
text: Ghar walo ke sath tumhara rishta bas ek kamane wale hisse tak simat gaya hai, jahan tumhari apni thakaan ke liye koi jagah hi nahi bachi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unki bhi galti nahi hai, wahan kheti ke ilawa koi aur source nahi hai income ka. Par sach me ab lagta hai meri saans lene ki jagah bhi nahi bachi is lagatar tension me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shared a brief systemic anecdote about migrant workers to normalize the structural reality and reduce his personal guilt.
text: Bade shehar aakar kamane wale migrant logo me EMI aur sudden job loss ka bojh akele uthana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka dard nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki sabko gaon me shaan bachani hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach me koi nahi batata asliyat udhar. Par ab mere paas waqt kam hai. Bank ka koi notice aane se pehle mujhe batao main ab kya karoon, koi toh rasta nikalna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe to normalize seeking temporary relief from banks without adding personal failure stigma.
text: Achanak se aayi is economic hardship me, banks aur loan institutions ke paas bhi in situations ko handle karne ka procedure hota hai, ye system ka ek standard hissa hai jisme chupane wali koi sharam nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Acha? Mujhe toh yahi lag raha tha ki ek din bhi EMI bounce hui toh seedhe recovery agent gaon ka darwaza peetenge. Ye hardship procedure kya hota hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered practical, low-effort options to manage the immediate loan fear without adding new obligations.
text: Agar dimaag thoda shant ho pa raha hai, toh hum do aasan kadam soch sakte hain: ya toh bank ke toll-free number par EMI defer karne ka puchein, ya unhe ek simple email drop kar dein apni situation bata kar.

speaker: Seeker
text: Call karne me sharam aayegi, main theek se bol nahi paunga dar ke maare. Mail dalna theek rahega mere liye. Par kaise proceed karu, kya likhu usme?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Broke down the bank communication into a highly manageable, step-by-step micro-task.
text: Pehle phone me bank app se unka customer care email id nikal lo... phir ek short message likho ki temporary job loss ki wajah se mujhe EMI grace period chahiye... bas itna hi karke aaj bhej do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main id nikal leta hoon. Kam se kam ek written proof unke paas rahega ki main loan se bhagna nahi chahta, bas waqt chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighted his shift towards a more sustainable timeframe for managing his fears (Lens D).
text: Pichle kuch dino se aage kya hoga soch kar raat bhar jagne ke baad, aaj tumne sach me ek practical kadam lene ka faisla kiya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan thoda dimag clear lag raha hai abhi. Achanak notice aane wale darr se toh acha hi hai ki khud samne se situation clear kar du.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about economic fluctuations to normalize seeking space without guilt.
text: Financial pareshaniyan aur market ke utaar chadav kisi bhi working professional ke safar me aa sakte hain, ye ek structural baat hai, isme tumhari lagan ya mehnat ka koi failure nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Sayad main hi khud ko zyada kos raha tha. Thodi himmat wapas aa rahi hai ki shayad ye mushkil samay bhi nikal jayega. Kal se kya shuru karu main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided another very small, specific task to maintain momentum for tomorrow.
text: Kal subah ke liye ek aur aasan target rakh sakte hain: bas 15 minute nikal kar job portal par apne profile ko 'actively looking for jobs' mark kar dena bina kisi stress ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye toh main kal chai peete hue aaram se kar lunga. Gaon me abhi nahi bataunga, par apna apply karna silently start kar deta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected how he is managing his responsibilities logically instead of through sheer fear (Lens B).
text: Abhi tumne apni zimmedari ko sirf ghabrahat se dekhne ki bajaye, ek systematic aur thehre hue tareeqe se manage karna shuru kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Haan system se chalna hi theek hai. Lekin sach batau, abhi bhi thodi tension hoti hai toh lagta hai aage chahe jo ho jaye, mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga apne parivaar ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassured him that resting and health are not at odds with his duty.
text: Khud ko thoda aaram dena aur is bhagdaud me apni health ka dhyan rakhna ek sacha kadam hai, aur ye tumhari un parivaar wali duties ke khilaf bilkul nahi jata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa kabhi socha hi nahi tha maine. Bachpan se hume yahi lagta tha ki aadmi bas tension uthane aur paisa kamane ke liye paida hota hai. Par sharir hi nahi raha toh aage unka kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected how his rigid adherence to strength was hiding a fear of losing respect (Lens E).
text: Ek andruni darr tha ki agar thoda sa bhi thehar kar apna dhyan rakha, toh gaon ki wo shaan aur ijjat kahin khatam na ho jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul yahi baat hai. Par aaj realize ho raha hai ki bina thehre aur health manage kiye ye lamba safar nahi kat sakta. Main thoda break lunga, khud ko waqt dunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Invited him to reflect on how this new perspective changes his feeling of pressure.
text: Jab tum is nayi soch ke sath apne kal ke plans dekhte ho, toh wo pehle jaisa darr aur dabao ab kitna badla hua mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dabao toh hai par ab woh saans nahi rok raha meri. Ab ye ek normal dikkat lag rahi hai jise settle kiya ja sakta hai, na ki koi aisi aafat jisme marna hi pade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected his shift towards a more self-compassionate relationship with his familial duties (Lens C).
text: Apne parivaar aur khud ke beech tumne ab ek aisi nai samajh bana li hai, jahan tum unke liye khade ho sakte ho bina apni sehat ko poori tarah bhulaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut achi baat kahi aapne. Main aaj raat itne mahino baad aram se sounga. Is bure waqt me dimaag ka bojh halka karne ke liye bahut shukriya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided final validation, reinforcing his inner strength entirely independently of his job status.
text: Mujhe sach me khushi hai ki tumne itni ghabrahat ke beech bhi itni maturity aur suljhaw dikhaya, aur dhyaan rakhna, ek buri situation kabhi bhi tumhari asli kabiliyat kam nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Ghar ka bada beta hone ke naate, mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai. Breakdown karna gunah lagta hai mujhe. Subah naukri se nikalne ka email aaya, aur ab gaon ke sahukaar ka vyaj chukane ka darr dimaag mein baith gaya hai. Par main chup-chap doosri shift dhoondne nikal gaya hoon kyunki chit fund mein Papa ke paise doobne ke baad saara bojh mere kandhon par hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty frame where family obligation supersedes personal shock, using Lens B.
text: Aapne apni zimmedari ko itna aage rakha hai ki naukri jane jaisi badi baat par bhi aap bina ruke turant doosri shift dhoondne nikal gaye, taaki Papa aur ghar par koi aanch na aaye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Aur koi raasta bhi toh nahi hai na. Agar main ruk gaya toh sahukaar ghar pe aake khada ho jayega. Gaon mein izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Sacchi mein bolu toh andar se puri tarah toot chuka hoon, par breakdown karna gunah lagta hai hum jaise mardon ke liye. Bas ek structural endurance hai meri, chalte hi rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feared consequence of losing family honor using Lens E.
text: Yeh lagataar chalte rehne ki zaroorat ke peeche aapko yeh darr sata raha hai ki thoda sa bhi theharne se gaon mein sahukaar ke saamne parivaar ki izzat chali jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, biradari mein kisi ko pata chala toh jeena haram ho jayega. Papa pehle hi chit fund ke chakkar mein dhas chuke hain. Aaj subah se kuch khaya nahi hai, bas sadko pe ghoom raha hoon nayi factory mein kaam mangne. Thakan se bura haal hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the mild risk of not eating before using Lens D to mirror the unbroken duration of his struggle.
text: Bina kuch khaye-piye, aise pareshani ke achanak aane par kisi ka bhi bhookh udd jana aur bhatakna laazmi hai. Aap subah se lagataar in sadkon par ghoom rahe hain, is umeed mein ki jaldi se koi naya kaam mil jaye aur ghar ka kharch chalta rahe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Kaam toh milna hi chahiye, warna main kis kaam ka. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai main bas ek ATM banke reh gaya hoon apne ghar walo ke liye. Koi nahi poochta main kaisa hoon. Par ye sab sochna paap hai, breakdown karna gunah lagta hai, mard ko dard nahi hota na.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a shorter Lens C reflection on his isolation, ending in a soft pause.
text: Aapko lagta hai ki sab aapko sirf kamane wale zariye ki tarah dekhte hain, aur kisi ko aapki andar ki thakan ya akelepan ki koi fikar nahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi samjhe aap. Akela hi hoon is bade shehar mein. Pehle hub ke paas wale godown mein tha, wahan shift cut ho gayi email aate hi. Ab kiraya bhi dena hai aur vyaj bhi. Thakan aisi hai dimaag ki, lagta hai nassein phat jayengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a question after previous restatements to probe how he positions himself amidst this exhaustion and isolation.
text: Jab yeh akelepan aur dimaag ki nason ke phatne jaisi thakan aap par haavi hoti hai, toh aap apne aap ko is saare karz aur duty ke beech kahan khada paate hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Khada kahan paunga, lagta hai bas ek kachhe dhaage pe latak raha hoon. Duty aur is sahukaar ke vyaj ke beech mein meri saans ghoot rahi hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aata ki main ek insaan hoon ya sirf ek udhaar chukane wali machine.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep exhaustion that arises when Duty-Based coping meets severe financial strain.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki in zimmedariyon ke pahaad tale dabkar aapke andar ek bohot gehri, na khatam hone wali exhaustion baith gayi hai, kyunki aapki puri zindagi sirf udhaari chukane aur farz nibhane ke beech simat kar reh gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Ekdum wahi baat hai. Exhaustion aisi hai ki ab neend bhi nahi aati. Raat bhar sahukaar ka chehra aur Papa ki mayoosi ghoomti rehti hai. Itna sab hone ke baad bhi main chup hoon kyunki breakdown karna gunah lagta hai. Pata nahi kab tak chal payega ye sab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the structural pressure of migration and debt, separating his inherent worth from the job loss.
text: Is itne bade pressure aur akelepan ke beech aapka thak jana aur neend udd jana bilkul swabhavik hai. Aapka yeh structural endurance aur parivaar ke liye farz nibhana aapki bohot badi himmat dikhata hai, par naukri chutna aapki mehnat ya aapki value ko kisi bhi tarah kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Value toh paise se hi hai na shehar mein. Bina paise ke migrant mazdoor ki kya value? Par aapne sahi kaha, himmat toh nahi haar sakta. Lekin sach mein darr lagta hai ki agar agle hafte kist nahi gayi, toh gaon mein panchayat baithegi humare khilaf.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a single systemic disclosure to normalize the silent burden of debt among migrant breadwinners.
text: Ghar se door aakar kamaney walon mein achanak naukri jane par sahukaar aur panchayat ka yeh darr bahut common hai—sirf aap isme akele nahi hain, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki sab par ek accha beta banne ka dabaav hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Accha beta... yahi toh trap hai. Papa ne chit fund mein sab dubo diya, par beta hone ke naate mujhe sab theek karna hai. Gussa bhi aata hai kabhi kabhi unpar ki kyun kiya aisa, par phir control kar leta hoon. Duty pehle aati hai meri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring with Lens B how he actively suppresses his valid frustration to prioritize his role as the provider.
text: Papa ke faisle ki wajah se aapko gussa toh aata hai, par aap us gusse ko turant peeche dhakel dete hain kyunki aapke liye ghar ko bachaane ka farz us frustration se kahin zyada bada hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, gussa karke EMI toh chukegi nahi waise bhi. Par mera dimaag abhi kaam nahi kar raha hai, bilkul blank ho gaya hoon aaj subah se. Aap hi batao, is waqt main kya karoon? Main bas theek hona chahta hoon taaki factory walo se theek se baat kar saku.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Framing his mental blankness not as a failure, but as a normal structural response to abrupt economic distress.
text: Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki jab ekdum se naukri jati hai aur sahukaar ka bojh saamne aata hai, toh dimaag ka sunn ya blank hona ek natural structural response hai, yeh aapki kisi kamzori ka nishana nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Structural response hi hoga shayad. Par naye factory malik ko thodi samajh aayega ye sab. Mujhe koi raasta dikhaiye ki abhi ke abhi apni is ghabrahat aur blankness ko kaise door karu, kyunki thodi der baad ek nayi jagah jana hai shift mangne.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering simple, quick grounding techniques that fit his immediate need to prepare for the factory visit.
text: Interview se pehle dimaag ko thehraav dene ke liye hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Ya toh aap agle 5 minute ek jagah baith kar sirf apni saanson par dhyaan dijiye, ya paas ki tapri se ek chai lekar use dheere-dheere pee lijiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Saans lene se toh shayad aur overthinking shuru ho jayegi ki vyaj kaise dunga. Chai wali baat theek hai. Main yahan pass mein hi ek tapri par khada hoon, soch raha hoon chai hi le lu interview se pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking him step-by-step through the process of taking the tea break.
text: Bilkul, pehle yeh karo ki us tapri wale bhaiya se ek garma-garam chai lo… phir us chai ke cup ki aanch ko haathon mein mehsoos karte hue do ghoont aaram se piyo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye, uske alawa kuch mat socho abhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Le li chai. Garam hai kafi. Sach mein, chai hath mein aate hi ek ajeeb sa comfort lagta hai hum jaise des pardes walo ko. Thoda dhyan vyaj aur Papa ki fikar se hat ke is chai ke cup pe aaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to highlight the contrast between his continuous wandering and this brief moment of pause.
text: Subah se lagataar factory-dar-factory bhatakne aur fikar karne ke baad, aapne aakhir apne dimaag ko is chai ke ghoont ke zariye ek chota sa par zaroori sukoon ka waqt diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Sukoon zaroori bhi tha shayad. Breakdown karna gunah lagta hai mujhe hamesha, par ek chai ka break lena breakdown thodi hai. Dimaag jo sunn ho gaya tha email dekhne ke baad, ab lag raha hai theek se chalega nayi jagah pe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to reframe self-care as something that enhances, rather than betrays, his duty.
text: Aap dekh rahe hain ki yeh chota sa break lena aapki farz nibhane ki kabiliyat ko tod nahi raha hai, balki duty poori karne ke liye aapko aur zyada tayyar kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Agar main hi gir gaya sadak par chakkar khake, toh Papa ko chit fund ke bojh se kaun nikalega aur sahukaar se kaun niptega? Ye 5 minute ka time khud ko dena bhi duty ka hi hissa hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing rest as a systemic and practical tool for maintaining long-term endurance in the face of debt.
text: Aise kade waqt mein khud ko thoda thehraav dena aarthik sangharsh se lambe samay tak ladne ki ek bohot zaruri aur practical strategy hoti hai, yeh aage badhne ki structural endurance ka ek mahatvapurna hissa hi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne baaton baaton mein dimaag bilkul halka kar diya mera. Tension toh abhi bhi hai sahukaar ki, kist dene ki, par ab kam se kam seene mein dard nahi hai aur saans araam se aa rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to acknowledge that while the feared consequence remains, his physical reaction to it has eased.
text: Halaanki agle hafte ki kist aur vyaj ka darr abhi puri tarah khatam nahi hua hai, par aapne us darr ke bhoj ko is waqt itna halka kar liya hai ki ab aap asaani se saans le paa rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan babuji. Ab main interview ke liye jaunga andar factory mein. Aur udhar baat nahi bani toh raat ko doosri shift walo doston se milunga. Kuch na kuch toh jugaad ho hi jayega. Haath pair salaamat hain mere.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Praising his resilience and practical next steps.
text: Aapka yeh jazba aur haar na manne wali himmat waqai tareef ke kabil hai. Naukri ke achanak jane par bhi turant nayi jagah koshish karna bilkul aapke majboot kirdar aur farz ke prati nishtha ko darshata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Kabhi kisi ne aisi baatein nahi ki mujhse. Hum migrant mazdoor bas shehar ki bheed mein gayab ho jate hain. Par aaj lag raha hai ki mera wajood sirf ATM machine hone tak seemit nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational shift from feeling invisible to feeling seen as a human being.
text: Aapko pehli baar yeh mehsoos ho raha hai ki is shehar ki anjaani bheed mein koi aapki asaliyat ko samajh raha hai, jo sirf aapki kamayi ya udhaari chukane se kahin aage hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Bilkul. Main theek ho jaunga ab. Sahukaar ho ya email, nipat lunga main sabse. Breakdown karna gunah lagta hai, par sach me apni thakan baant lena us gunah se bachne ka ek nuskha hi hai. Main bas abhi nikalta hoon gate ki taraf.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to reflect the shift in time from the heavy morning to a prepared forward movement.
text: Apne is safar ke sabse bhaari aur lambe din ko aapne kitni samajhdari se shant kiya hai, aur ab aap aage ke kaam ke liye nayi tayyari ke sath factory ke gate ki taraf badh rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haanji. Apne thoda time nikal ke meri baatein suni, iske liye aapka bahut bahut dhanyawad. Bhagwan apka bhala kare. Chalta hoon main abhi apna farz aage badhane.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a final culturally resonant encouragement for his upcoming interview.
text: Aap apni iss nayi koshish ke liye bilkul poori tarah tayyar hain. Aapke is sangharsh aur safar ke liye bahut saari shubhkamnayein, aap poore atma-vishwas ke sath aage badhiye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan se kahi zyada badi hai
text: Mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan se kahi zyada badi hai. MNC ki job chali gayi par main bimar hone ka bahana bhi nahi kar sakta kyunki agle hafte home loan ki kist bharni hai. 45 saal ki umar mein ab kahan jaunga pata nahi, par remittance band hui toh gaon mein sab bhookhe marenge. Mujhe bas apne kartavya ke liye endure karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty and role frame (Lens B) to validate his sense of obligation towards his family over his own exhaustion.
text: Aapke liye sabse pehle aapka parivaar aur unki zarooratein aati hain, isliye itna bada career setback hone ke baad bhi aap apne baare mein sochne ke bajaye home loan aur gaon ki remittance ki fikr kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan se kahi zyada badi hai
text: Karni padegi na fikr. Sab sambhal lenge, aadat hai mujhe har musibat jhelne ki. Par jabse HR ne woh termination letter hath mein diya hai, main bas phone mein calculations kar raha hoon. Agar remittance nahi gayi, toh unka chalega kaise?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence (Lens E) of his village family going hungry if his money stops.
text: Agar aapse paise jana band ho gaye toh gaon mein aapke gharwalo ka guzara kaise hoga, yeh khayal hi aapko is waqt sabse zyada dara raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan se kahi zyada badi hai
text: Darr toh hai ji. Pichle 20 saal se har mahine ki 1 tareekh ko paise bheje hain maine wahan. Ab 45 ki umar mein MNC wale aise nikal denge, kabhi socha nahi tha. Par mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan se kahi zyada badi hai, so I have to keep standing.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the time and duration (Lens D) of his long career and the sudden heavy burden he faces at this age.
text: Pichle bees saal ki lagatar mehnat ke baad, achanak se is age mein yeh rukaawat aana, aur phir bhi aage ke kartavya ke liye khud ko tyaar rakhna bahut bada bojh hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh toh hai, par main kisko bataun? Biwi bacho ko bataunga toh wo bechare ghabra jayenge. Sab log completely mujh par depend karte hain. Kabhi kabhi dimag numbers dekhte dekhte bilkul sunn pad jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a question to explore the internal emotional cost of carrying this burden alone and going numb.
text: Apne parivaar ko bachaane ke chakkar mein, yeh jo lagatar akele saara bojh utha kar dimag ka sunn pad jana hai, us akelepan mein aap kaisa mehsoos kar rahe hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Akelepan se darr lagta hai. Bas chupchap coffee peeta hoon aur raat ko LinkedIn khol leta hoon ki koi aur option dikh jaye. Agar gaon mein rishtedaron ko pata chal gaya ki meri MNC job chali gayi hai, toh izzat mitti mein mil jayegi sabke saamne.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational consequence (Lens C) of his reputation in the village, respecting the stigma cue with a soft close.
text: Aapko lagta hai ki agar gaon mein kisi ko bhi yeh baat pata chali, toh saalo se banayi hui us izzat par bahut asar padega...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... aur main unko yeh kamzori dekhne nahi de sakta. Unki nazar mein main ek bada aadmi hoon. Par andar hi andar, sach bolu toh main toot raha hoon. 45 ki age mein achanak phir se freshers ki tarah struggle karna... main physically aur mentally poori tarah thak gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the core unexpressed feeling of deep EXHAUSTION hidden beneath his provider role.
text: Itni sari expectations poori karte karte aur sabke liye dhaal banne ke chakkar mein, lagta hai aap ek aisi gehri thakan aur exhaustion mehsoos kar rahe hain jise aap kisi ke aage express nahi kar sakte.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan se kahi zyada badi hai
text: Exactly. Main koi machine nahi hoon yaar, par pichle bees saal se maine machine ki tarah hi life guzari hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab chhod-chhad ke bas so jaun, rest karu. Par phir yaad aata hai ki mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan se kahi zyada badi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his exhaustion as natural for a breadwinner in an MNC setup, separating his self-worth from the layoff.
text: Ek breadwinner ke taur par saari family ki zarooratein akele poori karna kisi bhi insaan ko completely thaka sakta hai, aur aisi ghutan mehsoos karna bilkul natural hai. Par kisi bhi MNC ka yeh layoff ka faisla aapki itne saalon ki mehnat aur value ko zara bhi kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap theek keh rahe hain. Value toh hai meri, tabhi itne saal kaam kiya. Par kal subah jab uth kar office jaane ka woh pressure nahi hoga na, toh mujhe bahut ajeeb aur guilty feel hoga. Din bhar ghar mein chhup kar time kaatna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a brief systemic anecdote to normalize hiding layoffs to maintain the image of the 'man of the house'.
text: Hamare society mein 40s wale professionals ke beech yeh layoff ka sach chupana bahut common hai — sirf aapke saath nahi ho raha, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki har kisi ko apne parivaar ke saamne hamesha strong aur successful dikhne ka pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot strong pressure hota hai, sach mein. Par sirf ghutne aur darrne se mera home loan toh nahi chukega na. Ek din ka time theek tha numb feel karne ke liye, par ab mujhe aage ka kuch sochna padega. Ab kya karoon, bataiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering two short, low-effort suggestions that match his provider logic and can be done quietly.
text: Aage ka raasta dhoondhne ke liye hum do chhote steps le sakte hain jo shayad 10 minute lenge. Ya toh hum chupchap aapke emergency savings ka current balance check kar sakte hain, ya phir ek paper par agle 2 mahine ke fixed kharcho ka ek mota-moti hisaab likh sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Savings ka balance check karna theek rahega. Expenses ki calculation karne se abhi panic hota hai, par emergency fund mein exactly kitna pada hai, yeh samne ho toh thodi tension kam hogi shayad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Executing the savings check suggestion step-by-step to help him regain practical control.
text: Theek hai, ek lamba saans lijiye, aur pehle apna bank app ya net banking apne phone par login kariye... phir bas wahan apna current liquid balance dekh lijiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye, aage ka zyada hisaab abhi nahi karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dekh liya maine. Thoda sa relief hai dekh kar. Kam se kam 3 mahine ki EMI aur gaon ka remittance bina kisi aur se maange nikal jayega. Par uske baad kya? 4 mahine baad toh meri saari life savings zero ho jayengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the time orientation (Lens D) of his relief for the short term, mixed with worry for the long term.
text: Aapko yeh toh tasalli mili ki agle teen mahine safely nikal jayenge, par us samay ke poora hone ke baad aage kya hoga, aane wale waqt ka khayal aapko phir se tension de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tension toh denge hi. Time bahut tezi se nikalta hai aise situations mein. Main soch raha tha apne purane boss ko message karu jahan maine 7 saal pehle chhoda tha. Par yaar, ego aur sharam beech mein aa rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational conflict (Lens C) between his pride and the necessity of asking for a favor.
text: Ek taraf purane boss ke paas laut kar madad maangne mein jhijhak aur ego feel ho rahi hai, aur dusri taraf parivaar ka khayal—in dono cheezon ke beech aap ulajh gaye hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan se kahi zyada badi hai
text: Ulajhna affford nahi kar sakta main. Ego rakha side mein, ego se thodi ghar ki EMI aur ration aata hai. Mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan aur sharam dono se kahi zyada badi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his duty logic (Lens B) where he actively suppresses his ego to fulfill his role.
text: Aapke liye apna ego aur sharam dono secondary ho jaate hain jab baat aapke parivaar ki suraksha aur apna kartavya nibhane ki aati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main unko aaj raat ko hi LinkedIn par ek casual message bhej dunga. Baat reference maangne ki hi toh hai. Zyada se zyada 'no' hi bolenge. Par waise ek baat aur dimag mein aayi thi mere biwi ke baare mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his willingness to put his ego aside and reach out as a strength before moving to his next thought.
text: Apni ego ko side mein rakh kar apne future ke liye reference maangna as a provider aapki ek bahut badi strength aur maturity dikhata hai. Aap apni biwi ke baare mein kuch soch rahe the?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main soch raha tha ki unhe totally andhere mein rakhna bhi sahi nahi hoga. Kal jab main ghar par hi milunga subah toh woh darr jayengi. Pata nahi unko thoda sa hint dena sahi rahega ya nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe that sharing limited context safely reduces the breadwinner's isolating pressure.
text: Aksar aisi financial difficulties mein poora bojh akele dhona aur chhupana family system ko aur stressful bana deta hai, jabki partners ko ek safe hisse tak context dene se aapka isolating pressure bhi thoda kam ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Point toh hai isme. Layoff word use nahi karunga, usse panic machega. Main sirf yeh kahunga ki company mein kuch restructuring chal rahi hai isliye abhi hume thoda savings mode mein rehna hoga aur main kuch din WFH karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence (Lens E) of avoiding panic while slowly introducing the new reality.
text: Aap unhe ekdum se bada aur sudden jhatka dekar unka darr nahi badhana chahte, isliye bohot carefully unko naye routine ke liye tyaar kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda. Ghar ka mahaul stable rakhna bahut zaroori hai. Bachon ke exams bhi aane wale hain agle mahine. Main unko disturb nahi kar sakta kisi bhi keemat par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational priority (Lens C) of protecting his children's peace during exams.
text: Apni biwi ki health aur bachon ki padhai ko pehle rakh kar, aap akele is toofan ko bahar hi rokna chahte hain taaki unki peace bani rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Toofan akele jhelne ki aadat daal li hai isliye. Main kal subah apne normal time par hi uthunga, ready hoke kisi paas ke cafe chala jaunga aur wahan baith kar shanti se naukari.com aur LinkedIn par apply karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his duty logic (Lens B) to acknowledge how maintaining a schedule keeps him grounded.
text: Aapne sirf financial balki ghar ke mahaul ko theek rakhne ka bojh uthate hue, apne liye ek solid plan aur structure tay kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Structure hone se kam se kam woh sunn-pann wapas nahi aayega dimag mein. Aaj aapse baat karke theek lag raha hai. Ek ajeeb sa block tha jo clear ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duration/time factor (Lens D) of keeping a routine.
text: Aap apna wahi purana office ka daily routine apne liye waise hi barkaraar rakhna chahte hain taaki aage aane wale dino mein waqt aur focus dono control mein rahein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan se kahi zyada badi hai
text: Sahi hai. Focus control mein rakhna zaroori hai. Ab main offline jaunga aur boss ka message draft karunga. Thank you meri baat sunne ke liye. Mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai woh meri personal thakan se kahi zyada badi hai, aur main rukhne nahi wala.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty mechanism (Lens B) one last time to validate his empowered and resilient departure.
text: Apne aage ke plans clear karke, aapne phir se saabit kar diya hai ki parivaar aur unke prati aapka kartavya aapki sabse badi taqat hai jo aapko aage badhne ki himmat deta hai.
